strong.function: Energy storage, absorption, nutrient accumulation, inward gathering

weak.function: Respiratory system, dispersal, outward energy projection, exhaling and releasing

organ_balance.note: In SCM, organs refer to functional systems, not strict anatomical organs. Liver = storage/absorption function. Lung = dispersal/respiratory function.

body_characteristics.build: Tends toward a sturdier, thicker frame. Well-developed waist and abdominal area. Strong bones and musculature.
body_characteristics.head_neck: Broader face, often with thicker features. Steady, calm expression.
body_characteristics.metabolism: Slow metabolism, excels at storing energy and nutrients, difficulty dispersing and expelling. Gains weight most easily of all types.

personality.seong_innate: Patient, persistent, reliable, steady. Strong endurance and willpower. Conservative and methodical in approach.
personality.jeong_emotion: Prone to overindulgence and comfort-seeking. Can become stubborn or inert. Reserved but deeply loyal.
strengths: Good at accumulating wealth and resources
weaknesses: Can be stubborn and resistant to change

protective_factors: Sweating through exercise (activates weak Lung function)

harmful_foods: Chicken in large amounts (more suitable for So-Eum)
diet.ginseng_reason: Tae-Eum types can tolerate ginseng in moderation. However, because their Liver (storage) is already strong, excessive use may lead to internal stagnation. Better to use in combination with dispersing herbs.
diet.thermal_principle: Balance is key. Avoid extremely heavy, oily, or stagnation-promoting foods. Incorporate foods that aid dispersal and lung function.

skincare.skin_tendency: Tends toward thicker, oilier skin. Prone to body acne, eczema, and dermatitis, especially when Lung function is impaired. Large pores. Skin may be dull from sluggish circulation.
skincare.routine_principle: Focus on circulation-boosting and detoxifying ingredients. Exfoliate regularly. Lightweight but nourishing formulas over heavy creams.

beneficial.name: Mahwang (마황)
beneficial.action: Opens Lung function, promotes sweating and dispersal — key herb for Tae-Eum

beneficial.name: Uihyin (의이인)
beneficial.action: Drains dampness, supports metabolism, benefits skin

beneficial.name: Kilgyeong (길경)
beneficial.action: Opens Lung, expels phlegm, lifts energy upward

beneficial.name: Galgeun (갈근)
beneficial.action: Releases muscle tension, promotes circulation, clears heat

avoid.name: Bujauh (부자)
avoid.reason: Hot herb primarily for So-Eum; promotes storage which Tae-Eum already excels at

avoid.name: Gangang (건강)
avoid.reason: Warming interior herb better suited to cold constitutions

herbs.classic_formula: Taeeumjowi-tang (태음조위탕) — regulates Liver excess and strengthens Lung deficiency

research_notes.genetic: GWAS studies have identified specific genetic loci associated with Tae-Eum type. Metabolomics confirms significantly different serum lipid profiles.
research_notes.metabolic: Research confirms significantly higher BMI, waist circumference, and metabolic syndrome rates in Tae-Eum types compared to other types eating similar diets. This aligns with the 130-year-old theory of strong Liver (storage) and weak Lung (dispersal).
research_notes.heritability: SCM type heritability estimated at 41–55% based on twin studies (2019). Tae-Eum physical traits show highest heritability among all four types.
